data.title: Tesla To Rely On Pre-Assembled Superchargers To Keep Up Deployment In Nordic Winters, Says Exec
data.description: EV giant Tesla will rely on pre-assembled superchargers in the Nordic countries including Norway to keep up the pace of deployment in the freezing temperatures, senior company executive Max de Zegher said on Thursday.

data.title: Why Kentucky Is Keeping Marijuana Applicants' Names A Secret
data.description: Kentucky withholds medical marijuana applicant names, sparking transparency concerns and legal challenges over out-of-state influence.

data.title: If You Invested $1,000 In Bitcoin When Trump Said US Will Be 'Crypto Capital Of The World,' Here's How Much You'd Have Today

data.title: New York Medical Cannabis Industry Challenges The State's System: $20M Fee Per Operator At Stake
data.description: The NYMCIA challenges New York's $20 million cannabis license fee in court, arguing it's unconstitutional and unfair to cannabis operators.

data.title: Robinhood Markets Grows Into 'Best-In-Class' Brokerage, Analyst Says
data.description: Analysts have updated coverage and raised price targets on Robinhood Markets after the company hosted its first investor day on Wednesday and showed significant growth across customers, assets under custody and trading volumes.
